name: Chicken with Lima Beans C/p
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken pieces with salt and pepper.
2. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add butter to the skillet and fry the chicken on both sides until browned.
4. Transfer the fried chicken and potatoes to the crockpot.
5. Add the thawed lima beans, chicken broth, and thyme to the crockpot.
6. Cover the crockpot and cook on low for 4 to 6 hours.
